summary: Full e2e testing of JOTEC Showcase app. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI looks excellent with proper gradient branding, all sections functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Missing data-testid on Navbar, Hero, ProductGrid product cards, and nav CTA button - not blocking but should be added for future test automation reliability
seed_data_creation: Created one test inquiry via POST /api/inquiries
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs (GET /api/products, GET /api/products/{slug}, POST /api/inquiries, GET /api/inquiries) fully tested and passing. Frontend: Navbar, Hero (gradient on 'speed of light'), ProductGrid (5 cards), CompareSection (5 tabs switch correctly), ContactForm (submits, shows toast, clears form), Footer (logo + 5 product links) - all working. Missing data-testid on some elements but UI is functional.
